message.content:
@startuml

actor Activity
participant "BaseMediaActivity" as BMA
participant "MediaActivity" as MA

Activity -> BMA : onCreate
BMA -> BMA : set theme
BMA -> BMA : setup navigation drawer

alt [new activity]
    BMA -> MA : getActionBarTitle()
    MA --> BMA
    hnote over BMA #LightYellow : set home icon to hamburger icon
else restore action bar
    hnote over BMA #LightYellow : get home icon and action bar title\nfrom saved instance
end

BMA -> BMA : updateActionBar

alt [no fragment in layout (new activity)]
    BMA -> MA : createFragment()
    MA --> BMA
    BMA -> BMA : add fragment
end

BMA --> Activity

Activity -> BMA : onCreateOptionsMenu
hnote over BMA #LightYellow : inflate generic menu items
BMA --> Activity

hnote over MA #LightYellow : user selects media item

MA -> BMA : showFragment()
hnote over BMA #LightYellow : sets up the shared element transition\nand updates the dataholder
BMA -> BMA : replace current fragment\nwith new fragment

@enduml
